items.title: Research & Analytics
items.description: Publishing institutional-grade equity research, macroeconomic analyses, and sector deep-dives used by 1200+ students and professionals.

items.title: Live Consulting Projects
items.description: Partnering with corporates like Nykaa, HPCL, and REC on real-world strategy, market entry, and financial modeling engagements.

items.title: Global Exposure
